tasks.label: Build Extension (Test & Package)
tasks.detail: Runs unit tests and packages both Chrome and Firefox extensions

tasks.label: Run Unit Tests
tasks.detail: Runs Jest/node native unit tests located in tests/ directory

tasks.label: Stage: Chrome (Dev)
tasks.detail: Prepares an unpacked Chrome extension in dev mode (debug logs enabled)

tasks.label: Stage: Chrome (Prod)
tasks.detail: Prepares an unpacked Chrome extension in production mode

tasks.label: Stage: Firefox (Dev)
tasks.detail: Prepares an unpacked Firefox extension in dev mode (debug logs enabled)

tasks.label: Stage: Firefox (Prod)
tasks.detail: Prepares an unpacked Firefox extension in production mode

tasks.label: Package: Chrome Extension
tasks.detail: Builds and packages Chrome extension into a .zip archive

tasks.label: Package: Firefox Extension
tasks.detail: Builds and packages Firefox extension into a .xpi archive

tasks.label: Package All Extensions
tasks.detail: Packages both Chrome and Firefox extensions for store submission

tasks.label: Validate Release Tag
tasks.detail: Checks if the current git tag matches the version in manifests/base.json
